← → aim · hold space · release to shoot

POP-A-SHOT

Arcade Shootout
How to play

Beat the buzzer.

⇧
Press to aim — the Hand tracks your finger. Swipe up to shoot: a fast flick fires a line drive, a smooth stroke lofts the arc.
PAD
Two-finger swipe up on the trackpad shoots — speed is power, drift is angle.
←→SPACE
Arrows slide the Hand. Hold Space to charge — the meter climbs, peaks, then falls. Release at the crest. Overcharge bricks it.
Shoot on camera — raise your hand and flick up to release. Flick speed is power, drift is aim. Opt-in; tracking runs on your device.
60 seconds · first shot starts the clock · gold balls are worth 3
